title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Distribution Manager looking for your next big career move? DTDC International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DTDC International Enterprises:
DTDC International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC International Enterprises!
